name: codex-webnovel-writer
description: Codex-native Skills and templates for planning, writing, reviewing, and querying long-form Chinese web novels.

interface.shortDescription: Plan, draft, review, and query webnovel projects
interface.longDescription: A Codex-native writing workflow plugin for Chinese webnovel projects, using focused Skills for initialization, planning, chapter drafting, review, and project queries.
defaultPrompt: Use the webnovel Skills to initialize, plan, draft, review, or query a long-form fiction project.
